feature: ReturnOrderBy5 - Order by in combination with column renaming

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy5 - Order by in combination with column renaming-[1] Renaming columns before ORDER BY should return results in ascending order
scenarios.description: [1] Renaming columns before ORDER BY should return results in ascending order
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.num AS n
ORDER BY n + 2
